description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding cabinet or shelf unit with a dark brown, wood-like finish. The front side features two large sliding doors that conceal the interior, while the back side reveals four open shelves divided by a central vertical partition. The sides are plain and match the wood texture of the rest of the unit. The base is slightly elevated on small, dark feet, providing stability and a subtle lift from the ground. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, dark brown wood-finished cabinet with sliding doors on one side and open shelves on the other, elevated on small feet.
description_view_0: A plain, narrow side view showing the wood-textured panel and the small feet at the base.
description_view_1: The front view displays two large, flat sliding doors with a seamless wood finish, concealing the interior shelves.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors the first, showing a plain wood-textured panel and the feet.
description_view_3: The back view reveals four open shelves divided by a central vertical partition, with a contrasting lighter interior.
